texto: As long as high schools strive to list the number of Ivy League schools their graduates attend and teachers pile on work without being trained to identify stress-related symptoms, I fear for our children’s health. I am not mollified by the alums of my daughter’s school who return to tell everyone that the rigor of high school prepared them for college, making their first year easier than they’d anticipated.If they make it that far.
explicacao: Citação de Candy Schulman sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “As long as high schools strive to list the number of Ivy League schools their graduates attend an…” articula educacao, college, creativity em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e termino.
